name: Sack of Rotten Fruit
description:
Activate 1 Strike

Each of these unassuming sacks contains enough rotting fruit to provide a fungus leshy with 1 week's worth of rations, along with clusters of stones to help press out the fruit's juices. When you Strike a creature with a sack of rotten fruit, the sack is consumed while the creature takes ] damage and must attempt an save. On a failure, the creature is Sickened 1. The range increment of a thrown sack of rotten fruit is 20 feet.
